states.name: MoveTo(λ_target0(), True)
states.description: Move 4 to 8 meters away left of teammate where teammate's passing lane is clear (2m width).

states.name: Shoot(goal)
states.description: No pressure from opponent, shooting for goal.

states.name: Pass(teammate)
states.description: Now, defender blocks path to goal. Look for teammate in open position, lane 2m wide.

states.name: StopAndReceiveBall()
states.description: Receive pass and wait until I regain possession of the ball.

transitions.description: No pressure from opponent, shooting for goal.
Wait until I have ball possession after teammate passes to me.
Teammate should move closer to goal (<8m), then pass back to me.
